summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification for five open PRs. No shared canonical was inferred; no close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutation is planned. Four PRs are kept independent, and one green focused contributor PR is routed to maintainer review.

actions.reason: Open scoped PR with author follow-up and failing checks; keep it out of dedupe/closure for this inventory shard.
Maintainer-owned focused PR remains an independent open work item; no inventory cleanup action is justified.
This is a green focused contributor PR ready for maintainer review, but the job forbids merge/fix and requires human judgment for green checks and technical correctness.
The PR may be useful, but it lacks required proof and has failing checks, so it should remain open as independent author-followup work.
Open non-duplicate PR with useful code and active waiting-on-author status; keep independent for maintainer workflow rather than inventory cleanup.

needs_human: #87861 needs maintainer technical correctness and merge-readiness review if maintainers want to advance it; this plan cannot merge or fix and review-comment hydration for Copilot-generated comments is absent.
